calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:45am
Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Appellant, Bay Auto World appears by President, Adel Saadah with counsel Richard M. Osborn; respondent, Josep P. Peters-Mathews, appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Brant.

EXHA - DUE BILL/BILL OF SALE
EXHR - BILL STATEMENT/JOSEPH PETERS-MATHEWS DECLARATION

Unmarked evidence is submited for JPT Brant to keep per appellant and respondent.

11:30am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Judgment Entered
